description: Developed a modern customer portal for Nordea's corporate banking services. Built real-time transaction monitoring, payment workflows, and account management features using React and GraphQL.
title: Nordea Corporate Banking Portal
challenge: Legacy system with poor UX and limited real-time capabilities. Needed to build a modern, secure portal while maintaining backwards compatibility with existing banking systems.
contribution: Lead frontend developer responsible for React architecture, GraphQL integration, and implementing secure authentication flows. Collaborated closely with Nordea's security team to meet banking regulations.
result: Delivered a responsive portal used by 5000+ corporate clients. Achieved 95% user satisfaction score and reduced common task completion time by 40%. Zero security incidents during deployment.
skills: React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Node.js, PostgreSQL, OAuth2, Jest, Cypress
